creator: count@211.ru
text:
Good day, Edwin.

There are PR/139364 awaiting for commit.

On Thu, 29 Oct 2009, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of net-mgmt/noc,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/140079 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140079
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Stanislav Svirid
